generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on building operational status"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights from building performance simulations"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on visual comfort levels for occupant satisfaction"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on non-visual health effects from environmental factors"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building data for intuitive understanding"
]

instance AdjustHVACSetpoint : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC setpoints based on energy optimization insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingLevel : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting levels based on visual comfort analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustVentilation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of ventilation systems for non-visual health optimization",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operational status in real-time",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building performance simulation for scenario analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization using reinforcement learning",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACSetpoint
]

instance VisualComfortAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort for occupant well-being",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, AdjustLightingLevel
]

instance NonVisualHealthOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of non-visual health effects through environmental adjustments",
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectInsight, AdjustVentilation
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building models and sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data ingestion platform for secure and scalable MQTT-based communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device and data management",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, Simulation, EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortAnalysis, NonVisualHealthOptimization
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for real-time rendering of building models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualization
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for creating and enriching geometric and semantic models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualization
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor collecting real-time operational data from physical building"
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor monitoring room occupancy levels"
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor measuring ambient light levels"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator within Building Control Systems for HVAC control"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator within Building Control Systems for lighting control"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance ProcessedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed temperature data for energy optimization",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ProcessedOccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed occupancy data for visual comfort analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ProcessedLightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed light data for visual comfort analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric and semantic models enriched with device-specific metadata (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RuntimeArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime artifacts generated from BIM model transformations for data exchange and visualization",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by DT services (e.g., optimized HVAC settings) sent via Eclipse Ditto to actuators in the Building Control System, enabling real-time adjustments to physical infrastructure as part of bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twins, ensuring continuous data exchange and operational alignment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A BIM-centric architecture integrating Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular services orchestrated through standardized extension points for scalable, service-oriented DT deployment across AECO workflows."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the 'as operated' phase during building operation, with potential for integration into design and construction phases via BIM, but primarily focused on operational monitoring and optimization throughout the complete building life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity measured via the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which quantifies synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual components, validated through case study evaluation in a Living Lab environment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange facilitated by Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication between physical assets and the digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC) for semantic modeling, with standardized interfaces for Hono/Ditto integration to ensure interoperability across AECO systems and address fragmented data sources."
]
